inputs.name: in
inputs.label: Text to Extract From
inputs.description: Source text to extract structured data from.

inputs.name: model
inputs.label: Model Override
inputs.description: Overrides the configured model at runtime.

inputs.name: schema
inputs.label: Schema Override
inputs.description: JSON schema overriding the configured fields to extract.

outputs.name: out
outputs.label: Extracted JSON
outputs.description: Structured object with the extracted fields as key-value pairs.

outputs.name: error
outputs.label: Error
outputs.description: Error message if the AI call or extraction failed.

properties.label: Fields to Extract (one per line: name: description)
properties.placeholder:
name: Full name of the person
date: Date in ISO format
amount: Dollar amount as a number

properties.label: Context
properties.placeholder: This is a customer support email.
